title: ORICHILL Client
description: ORICHILL Client - ORICHILL server client aimed at improving visuals and optimization for better gameplay on the server.
body:
# 📖 General information about the client
**ORICHILL Client** - A client for the ORICHILL server, aiming to optimize with the [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) mod-pack, as well as improving the visuals to make the player's gameplay something more beautiful.

This mod-pack with resource packs was made in order to immediately provide the optimal client variant for playing on the server ORICHILL. It improves the visual component and emphasizes the important aspects of the game on it. Anyone who wants to improve their game can download and try this mod-pack. It will definitely not leave you disappointed.

# 🍃 What is included in this client?
### 🤗 Mod-Packs:
- **[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)**

### 😉 Mods that were added outside of the Mod-Pack:
- **[BindCommands](https://modrinth.com/mod/bindcommands)**
- **[Crash Assistant](https://modrinth.com/mod/crash-assistant)**
- **[3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)**
- **[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)**
- **[Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)**
- **[ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus)**
- **[In-Game Account Switcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-game-account-switcher)**
- **[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)**
- **[Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound)**
- **[Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches)**
- **[Immersive Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-hotbar)**
- **[Scribble](https://modrinth.com/mod/scribble)**
- **[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/scribble)**
- **[AsyncPackScan](https://modrinth.com/mod/async-pack-scan)**
- **[Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/async)**
- **[Options Profiles](https://modrinth.com/mod/options-profiles)** 
- **[Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft)** (**Version 2.0.1+**)
- ┖ For Emotecraft the **SPEMOTES ALL** emote pack was installed
- **[Marlow's Crystal Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/marlow-crystal-optimizer)** (**Version 4.0.2+**)
- **[Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)** (**Version 4.0.2+**)
- **[Remember My Txt](https://modrinth.com/mod/remember-my-txt)** (**Version 4.0.2+**)
- **[Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)** (**Version 5.0.0+**)
- **[Smooth Scrolling](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll)** (**Version 5.0.0+**)
- **[Achievements Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/achievements-optimizer)** (**Version 5.0.0+**)
- **[Reflex AntiLag](https://modrinth.com/mod/reflex-antilag)** (**Version 5.0.0+**)
- **[ModernFix-mVUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus)** (**Version 5.0.0+**)

<details>
<summary>List of removed mods</summary>

- **[Visible Offhand](https://modrinth.com/mod/visible-offhand)** (**Removed from 3.0.1+**)
- **[AsyncParticles](https://modrinth.com/mod/asyncparticles)** (**Removed from 5.0.0**)
- **[Raknetify](https://modrinth.com/plugin/raknetify)** (**Removed from 5.0.0**)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Removed Resource Packs</summary>

- **FA_fix - A resource pack created by us to make minor improvements while fixing some issues in - FreshAnimations.** (Was removed in version 3.1.1 due to the new version FreshAnimation 1.10.0)
- **[Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)** (**Removed 4.0.2+**)
- **[VT villager variations for Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vt-villagervariations-for-freshanimations)** (**Removed 4.0.2+**)


</details>


Also, if you can allocate more than 4GB of RAM, then use these launch flags:

```
-XX:+IgnoreUnrecognizedVMOptions -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 -Djava.awt.headless=true -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:MaxDirectMemorySize=1024G -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:-ZProactive -XX:ZYoungCompactionLimit=20 -XX:ZFragmentationLimit=20 -XX:ZUncommitDelay=6 -XX:ZCollectionIntervalMinor=1.2 -XX:ZCollectionIntervalMajor=30.0
```


# SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS:
(The results were made based on shaders)
### **⚠️ MINIMALS:**
- **CPU:** **INTEL** CORE I5-2500f or **AMD** RYZEN 5 1600
- **GPU:** **NVIDIA** GTX 760 or **AMD** RADEON R9 270X
- **RAM:** 16 GB

### **✅ RECOMMENDED:**
- **CPU:** **INTEL** CORE I5-6600K or **AMD** R5 3600
- **GPU:** **NVIDIA** GTX 1070 or **AMD** RADEON RX 580
- **RAM:** 16-32 GB
